summary: Wave 1 adds observe-only server session process cleanup telemetry before enforced process-tree termination.
ambiguities: Exact per-platform OS start identity collection is best-effort in Wave 1.
WSL Linux PID/PGID detection may remain unavailable and must be reported as degraded or skipped.
Telemetry retention is bounded by recent cleanup results and must not include raw terminal data.
implied_requirements: No process-name-based or broad kill behavior is introduced.
Unverified cleanup cases are observable and not force-killed.
Regression tests cover metadata capture, dry-run telemetry, mismatch/degraded status, double delete, and redaction.
